search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

table.title: Base: Device Software by Product Family

search.query: `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:device | stats values(deviceName) as deviceName by deviceId productFamily softwareVersion productId | search productId!=null | fields deviceId, deviceName, productId, productFamily, softwareVersion | $singleLineGroupSelector$
| stats count as Initialize | eval title="Software Diversity - Top 2 Diverse Families" | table title

panel.title: SW Diversity: Number of Software Verions - Enterprise
Software Versions by Product Family ("Head of the Diversity Snake")

chart.title: Deploy standard software versions (either Cisco Recommended, or more prevalent in production) to the Top 2 product families below

search.query: | loadjob $base_device_sw_family_sid$ | stats dc(softwareVersion) as "SW Versions" by productFamily | table productFamily, "SW Versions" | sort -"SW Versions"

single.title: Sum of devices in Top 2 Families by # versions

search.query: | loadjob $base_device_sw_family_sid$ | eventstats dc(softwareVersion) as VersionsInFamily by productFamily | eventstats count as DevicesRunningVersion by productFamily, softwareVersion, VersionsInFamily | search VersionsInFamily>=2 AND softwareVersion!="Not Found" | fields productFamily, softwareVersion, DevicesRunningVersion, VersionsInFamily | dedup productFamily, softwareVersion, DevicesRunningVersion, VersionsInFamily | sort -VersionsInFamily, productFamily | stats sum(DevicesRunningVersion) as Devices by productFamily, VersionsInFamily | sort -VersionsInFamily | head 2 | stats sum(Devices) as Top2devices

panel.title: Diversity Reduction Goal: Top 2 Diverse Families

single.title: # Versions to Eliminate by Consolidating Top 2 Diverse Families to 4 Versions per Family

search.query: | loadjob $base_device_sw_family_sid$ | eventstats dc(softwareVersion) as VersionsInFamily by productFamily | eventstats max(VersionsInFamily) as maxVersions | eventstats count as DevicesRunningVersion by productFamily, softwareVersion, VersionsInFamily | search softwareVersion!="Not Found" | table productFamily, DevicesRunningVersion, VersionsInFamily, maxVersions | dedup productFamily, VersionsInFamily | sort -VersionsInFamily, productFamily | head 2 | stats sum(VersionsInFamily) as Top2familyVersions | eval versionsSaved=Top2familyVersions-8 | eval fixedVersionsSaved = if(Top2familyVersions<8, 0, versionsSaved) | table fixedVersionsSaved

| loadjob $base_device_sw_family_sid$ | search productFamily!=null AND softwareVersion!="Not Found" | dedup deviceId, deviceName, productFamily, softwareVersion | eventstats dc(softwareVersion) as VersionsInFamily by productFamily | eventstats dc(deviceId) as DevicesInFamily by productFamily | eventstats count as DevicesRunningVersion by productFamily, softwareVersion, VersionsInFamily | fields productFamily, softwareVersion, DevicesRunningVersion, VersionsInFamily, DevicesInFamily | dedup productFamily, softwareVersion, DevicesRunningVersion, VersionsInFamily | stats sum(DevicesRunningVersion) as Devices by productFamily, softwareVersion, VersionsInFamily, DevicesInFamily | eval percDevices = round(100*Devices/DevicesInFamily) | sort percDevices
